creator: beyert@cs.ucr.edu
text:
This patch makes the following changes:

-Update gemrb to the latest version
-Makes according changes to distinfo
-Updates manual page file to gemrb.6

Fix: The included patches

--- distinfo.orig	2008-10-19 08:26:46.000000000 -0700
+++ distinfo	2009-03-31 13:25:20.000000000 -0700
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (gemrb-0.3.1.tar.gz) = 10aa640262b1708aab67f6dcfbd6bb55
-SHA256 (gemrb-0.3.1.tar.gz) = a86488d4503db1507f223d697f8f3b1e8c12258d199fc100addf879efcdc6369
-SIZE (gemrb-0.3.1.tar.gz) = 2006224
+MD5 (gemrb-0.3.2.tar.gz) = b553272df6109cfdfeb3234ce2213250
+SHA256 (gemrb-0.3.2.tar.gz) = 5d0a331c005e0dd18e94f017c1b14507da2d31946bd663342e0b3a4502bc0866
+SIZE (gemrb-0.3.2.tar.gz) = 2041006
--- distinfo.diff ends here ---
How-To-Repeat:     Apply the patches
